Package io.forja.components.overlays.fxConfirmDialog

Class FxConfirmDialog

java.lang.Object
io.forja.components.overlays.fxConfirmDialog.FxConfirmDialog
public class FxConfirmDialog extends Object
A confirmation dialog — an FxDialog preset with title, message, cancel + confirm buttons, and a boolean callback.

Static usage:

     
      FxConfirmDialog.ask(scene, "Delete project?",
          "This action cannot be undone.",
          confirmed -> { if (confirmed) doDelete(); });

Builder usage — for custom labels or variant tweaks:

     
      FxConfirmDialog d = FxConfirmDialog.builder()
          .title("Delete project?")
          .message("This action cannot be undone.")
          .cancelText("Keep it")
          .confirmText("Delete")
          .confirmVariant(ButtonVariant.DANGER)
          .onResult(confirmed -> ...)
          .build();
      d.show(scene);
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show(javafx.scene.Scene scene)

      public boolean isConfirmed()
      Returns whether confirm was clicked.

    • ask

      public static void ask(javafx.scene.Scene scene, String title, String message, Consumer<Boolean> onResult)
      Convenience — builds and shows a confirm dialog in one call.
      Parameters:
      scene - target scene
      title - dialog title
      message - body text
      onResult - callback (true = confirm, false = cancel)

    • builder

      public static FxConfirmDialog.Builder builder()
      Returns a new FxConfirmDialog.Builder for constructing an FxConfirmDialog.
      Returns:
      a new FxConfirmDialog.Builder instance
